text: Each commercial motor carrier shall maintain a commercial driver qualification file for each commercial driver it employs in accordance with rules and regulations of the commissioner of transportation; provided, however, that such a file need not include a medical examiner certificate of a commercial driver’s physical qualification to drive a commercial motor vehicle.

# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 5
#### Article 19
##### § 509-U — Commercial driver qualification files

Each commercial motor carrier shall maintain a commercial driver qualification file for each commercial driver it employs in accordance with rules and regulations of the commissioner of transportation; provided, however, that such a file need not include a medical examiner certificate of a commercial driver’s physical qualification to drive a commercial motor vehicle.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
